# Observability тАФ the complete debugging surface

Reference for humans and LLMs debugging the conversational pipeline. Everything
observable, where it lives, how to reach it. Built 2026-07-23 (conv_events
hardening); the older per-turn obs (Session/Turn/Step) predates it.

## Mental model

- Three components: PHONE (dock app, pure renderer, mic/TTS), PERCEPTION
  (station audio front-end: VAD тЖТ endpointing тЖТ gates тЖТ STT sidecar), BRAIN
  (station: addressed/barge/stop verdicts тЖТ pi agent turns тЖТ speak frames).
- Two stores answer two questions:
  - `conv_events` (SQLite, 14d) тАФ "what did every gate/state machine decide,
    on every component, on one clock?" Includes decisions that did NOT become
    turns (the drops/skips тАФ the debugging gold).
  - obs Session/Turn/Step (SQLite) тАФ "inside a turn that ran, what exactly
    happened?" (steps, exact LLM request bytes, tools, cost, timings, replay).
- Correlation: `utteranceId` = `<dockId>:<audioStartMs>`, minted at audio
  segmentation; rides snapshot тЖТ conv_events тЖТ brain verdict тЖТ turn trigger тЖТ
  obs TurnRecord. audioStartMs doubles as the clip WAV filename key.
- Two clocks on utterance events: `audioStartAt/audioEndAt` = when the SOUND
  happened; `sttFinalAt` = when the transcript landed. Decisions between the
  two saw no text. Phone events carry `deviceTs` beside station arrival `ts`.

## UIs (browser, station :8099)

- `/#timeline` тАФ ЁЯз╡ Timeline: swimlanes (phone/perception/brain/conv) on one
  time axis. тЬХ = gate deaths (тЦ╢ plays the dropped clip), тЬУ = admitted turns,
  `stt +Nms` = STT lag, turn rows show trigger/admit/ЁЯУ╖ frame. тмЗ bundle =
  incident markdown for the visible window. Live 3s refresh.
- `/#observability` тАФ ЁЯУб per-session Turn/Step tree: admit chip per user turn,
  step timings/tokens/cost, ЁЯУи exact request peek, тЦ╢ turn replay, ЁЯУ╖ the input
  frame a vision turn's model saw.
- `/#perception` тАФ Perception Studio: snapshot streams (speech rows playable),
  enricher rows, takes A/B replay.
- `/#brain` тАФ live brain-debug inspector (in-flight turn state deltas).
- `/#cost` тАФ LLM spend rollups (source/kind/model/day/usecase).

## REST (all under /api)

- `GET /observability/conv-events?dock&from&to&limit&lanes=phone,brain`
  тАФ the raw cross-component event stream (epoch-ms params).
- `GET /observability/incident?dock&from&to[&format=md]` тАФ ONE bundle for a
  window: conv_events + full turns + perception snapshots, chronological.
  `format=md` = the paste-to-an-LLM incident document. THE debugging artifact.
- `GET /observability/sessions` / `sessions/:id` тАФ Session/Turn/Step trees.
- `GET /observability/requests/:sessionId/:turnId/:stepIndex` тАФ the EXACT
  request that LLM step sent (systemPrompt+messages+tool names; image bytes
  stripped but each unique frame saved once тЖТ `GET /observability/req-image?f=`,
  rendered as ЁЯУ╖ thumbnails in the ЁЯУи peek). The peek also colors each message
  green/orange by the step's reported cacheRead (estimated prefix boundary).
  Prompt structure (2026-07-23 cache fix v2): the system prompt is STATIC per
  session; all volatile per-turn material (framings/grounding/state/clock) rides
  a `[turn context]` block on the final user message and is stripped from past
  messages тАФ so the request prefix repeats and Gemini implicit caching can hit
  the whole history (measured full-prefix hit: 24.5k of 25.4k tokens).
- `GET /observability/turn-image?f=<dock>/<turnId>.jpg` тАФ the input frame a
  vision turn's model actually saw.
- `GET /observability/cost/summary|series?from&to&groupBy=` тАФ spend rollups.
- `GET /observability/health?window=N` тАФ latency percentiles + reliability.
- `GET /perception/utterance-audio/<dock>/<audioStartMs>` тАФ any utterance clip
  WAV, including gate-DROPPED ones (audioStartMs from the event/utteranceId).
- `GET /perception/snapshots` тАФ the snapshot ring (speech/vision/enriched/тАж).
- `GET /brain/:dock/debug/addressed` тАФ legacy in-memory verdict ring (cap 50);
  conv_events is the durable superset.
- `GET /brain/:dock/conversation` тАФ live conversation-state probe (mode,
  windowUntil, msToExpiry).

## Driving it for tests (no live mic needed)

- `POST /brain/:dock/debug/say {text}` тАФ tap + addressed final тЖТ real turn
  (dock speaks!). `POST /brain/:dock/debug/hear {text,[confTier]}` тАФ final with
  NO tap (exercises skip:not-addressed / queue:busy / stop-intent paths).
- `POST /brain/:dock/debug/tts-hold {hold}` тАФ drive the barge pause directly.
- adb: `adb shell am broadcast -a dev.orbit.dock.debug.SAY -e text 'тАж'`.
- Laptop `say "тАж"` near the dock exercises the REAL audio path end-to-end.

## conv_events vocabulary (lane ┬╖ type тЖТ meaning)

- perception ┬╖ `stt:drop` verdict `voiced-fraction` тАФ clip below the two-tier
  floor (35% while the dock speaks / 10% otherwise) dropped BEFORE the sidecar;
  detail {voicedPct, floorPct, speaking, durS, clip}. Clip is KEPT тАФ play it to
  check if real speech was eaten.
- perception ┬╖ `stt:drop` verdict `min-utterance` тАФ voiced span <180ms
  discarded at endpointing ("tapped but no reply" cause).
- perception ┬╖ `stt:withheld` verdict `hallucination|beep-artifact|
  low-conf-backchannel|no-words` тАФ transcribed, snapshot kept, blocked from
  becoming a turn.
- perception ┬╖ `stt:final` тАФ a transcript reached the brain; detail {tier, conf}.
- perception ┬╖ `stt:empty` тАФ VAD endpointed audio but the engine heard nothing.
- perception ┬╖ `stt:unreachable` тАФ sidecar down (dock is deaf).
- perception ┬╖ `vad:onset` тАФ тЙе240ms contiguous тЙе0.035-RMS voice (the barge
  trigger), fired whether or not the brain acted.
- perception ┬╖ `audio:decode-fail` тАФ opus decoder failing (audio vanishing).
- INJECTED sources are tagged: `utteranceId` prefix `debug:` = the debug REST
  API (debug/say / debug/hear тАФ no real audio); turn `via phone:turn-request` =
  phone-side debug/adb. Both render as a ЁЯТЙ tag in Timeline + Observability;
  `kind: replay` badges replay turns.
- brain ┬╖ `addr` verdict тАФ every admission decision: `RAN-TURN`, `wake`,
  `wake+command`, `skip:not-addressed|garbage|no-words|quiet|recording|stale|
  dismissed`, `queue:busy`, `drain:ran`, `merge:supersede`, `stop:dismiss|pause`,
  `barge:hold`, `barge:release:<why>`, `barge:skip:self-motion`. detail carries
  mode/tier/msToExpiry (+ via/admitRule/windowOpenedBy on RAN-TURN).
- conv ┬╖ `conv:<mode>` verdict `<reason>` тАФ every ConversationState transition
  (tap, palm-address, reply-followup, addressed-utterance, window-timeout,
  tts-start, tts-end, speak-timeout, think-timeout, dismissed, reconnect, тАж);
  detail {from, windowUntil}.
- phone ┬╖ `phone:<event>` тАФ device-side (needs app build тЙе58 sideloaded):
  `speech-status` {speaking}, `tts-pause`, `tts-resume`, `tts-auto-resume-timeout`
  {heldMs}, `tts-play-start`, `speak-edge` {rising}, `face-state` {from,to},
  `state-heal` {from}. Carries deviceTs; tsтИТdeviceTs тЙИ skew+transit.

## On disk (all self-pruning, cwd = orbit-station)

- `orbit.db` тАФ tables `conv_events`, `obs_sessions`, `obs_turns`, `obs_fts`,
  `obs_requests` (gzipped exact LLM requests, ~1wk byte-ring).
- `.data/utterance-audio/<dock>/<startedAtMs>.wav` тАФ every utterance clip
  incl. dropped (200MB budget).
- `.data/turn-images/<dock>/<turnId>.jpg` тАФ vision-turn input frames (200MB).
- `.data/enrich-audio/` (PERCEPTION_ENRICH_SAVE=1), `.data/search/` (visual-
  search shots, served via /observability/search-shot).
- Phone logcat tags: `DOCK_EVT` (event trace incl. `EVT vad-edge/speech-
  keepalive/turn-cancel`), `MIC_LIVE`, `VAD_LIVE`.

## Key gate thresholds (context for reading events; all env-tunable)

- Server VAD: voiced тЙе0.012 RMS (`STT_SILENCE_RMS`); endpoint 1300ms silence;
  min utterance 180ms; max 60s; preroll 200ms (vad-endpoint.ts).
- Barge onset: own floor 0.035 RMS, 240ms contiguous, 90ms gap tolerance.
- Voiced-fraction gate, TWO-TIER (2026-07-23): floor 35% while the dock is
  SPEAKING (`STT_MIN_VOICED_PCT` тАФ TTS echo is the phantom factory), 10%
  otherwise (`STT_MIN_VOICED_PCT_IDLE` тАФ measured: real far-field speech lives
  at 2-33% voiced; 16% of drops at the flat 35% floor carried real words).
  Drop events carry {voicedPct, floorPct, speaking}. 0 disables.
- Conf tiers (parakeet): garbage <0.72, shaky <0.85; whisper metric gates
  dormant under parakeet (null logprob/no_speech/compression).
- Windows (conversation-state.ts): LISTEN 8s, FOLLOWUP 8s, GRACE 2.5s,
  VAD_HOLD 30s, INTERIM_HOLD 8s, SPEAK_MAX 30s, THINK_MAX 60s.
- Brain barge: max hold 6s (timeout YIELDS тЖТ listening), cooldown 2.5s,
  self-motion mute 1.8s. Busy-queue item staleness 20s; MERGE_MAX 2.

## How to debug an incident (recipe)

1. Note the rough time + dock. Open `/#timeline`, pick the window (or curl
   `/api/observability/incident?dock=тАж&from=тАж&to=тАж&format=md`).
2. Find the utterance: `stt:final` (what was heard, with STT lag) or a тЬХ drop
   (play the clip тАФ was it real speech?).
3. Follow its `utteranceId` to the brain `addr` verdict (why it did/didn't run)
   and the conv transitions around it (was a window open? who opened it?).
4. If a turn ran: open it in `/#observability` тАФ admit chip, steps, ЁЯУи exact
   request, ЁЯУ╖ frame, tools, then тЦ╢ replay to re-drive it live.
5. Hallucination triage: STT-level = clip vs transcript; LLM-level = request
   ring + rawText vs speak frames. Gates are deterministic тАФ anything the
   events can't explain is model behavior.

## Beyond the conversation pipeline (whole-system observability)

- Body/motion: every servo command (accepted OR rejected, with source/priority/
  base pose/target) = `bodymotion` snapshot stream (Studio + /perception/
  snapshots); live "is it moving" = MotionExecutor.recentlyMoved; body console
  `/#bodylink` (state, /command, /play, lease holder).
- Dock conditions (ambient faults, e.g. `stt_unreachable` = deaf dock):
  core/conditions.ts; spoken to the user on next interaction; cleared on recovery.
- Session enrichment (per obs session): build provenance, effective config,
  active models, live system prompt, perception window, gate/addressed
  decisions snapshot тАФ on `GET /observability/sessions/:id`.
- Tasks (background jobs): `/#tasks` UI; `GET /brain/:dock/instances`; each
  instance writes a task.log (tmux process, docs/tasks.md).
- Turn replay: `POST /brain/:dock/replay` re-runs a recorded turn through the
  LIVE pipeline, no LLM calls (obs тЦ╢ button) тАФ sequencing/demo lever.
- Feedback bundles: `/#feedback` тАФ user feedback joined to session/turn traces.
- Cost anomalies: /#cost "Not counted above" footnote = uninstrumented call
  sites; new LLM call sites must wire pi StepEnd usage or reportGeminiCost.
- Health tripwire: `GET /observability/health` тАФ p50/p95 reply latency +
  reliability counters over last N turns.
- Bench: `/#bench` + committed bench/results/*.json (dock-LLM benchmark record).
- Wake near-misses: console log `[wake] тАж near-miss` (station stdout).
- Station stdout (tsx watch terminal): `[speech-watch]`, `[enrich]`, `[conv]`,
  `[wake]`, `[brain]` prefixes тАФ the pre-conv_events legacy layer.

## Known gaps

- Phone lane empty until the instrumented app build is sideloaded.
- Enricher/VL sidecar calls: cost-metered + Studio rows, but no per-call
  image refs in obs.
- Timeline turn rows don't deep-link into the Observability tree (ids shown).
- Clock skew shown raw (tsтИТdeviceTs); no RTT-compensated offset estimate.
